title: [T24-54] Experience and Interface Designer for ESG
description:
[12 months contract]

Role Overview:

As a UIUX Designer, you will play a key role in uncovering user needs, shaping user journeys, and designing intuitive and delightful experiences — all while collaborating closely with product managers, developers, and users. The ideal candidate should have a keen eye for detail, excellent problem-solving skills, and a deep understanding of user-centered design principles.

Key responsibilities:

  • User Research: Conduct interviews, observations, and usability testing to uncover pain points and user insights.
  • UX Design: Translate insights into user journeys, wireframes, and interactive prototypes.
  • UI Design: Craft intuitive, accessible, and visually engaging interfaces.
  • Workshop Facilitation: Lead design thinking sessions, problem-framing workshops, and ideation activities with public officers.
  • Collaborate Cross-Functionally: Work with product managers, engineers, and officers to define problems, ideate solutions, and iterate rapidly.
  • Experiment & Explore: Embrace new technologies, design methods, and tools to continuously improve how we work and what we build.

To qualify for the role, you must have / be able to demonstrate a combination of the following:

  • Bachelor’s degree in industrial design, human-computer interaction (HCI), graphic design or a related field (or equivalent experience).
  • At least 5 years of hands-on experience in UX design, including research and UI design
  • Strong portfolio showcasing user-centered design work and problem-solving ability
  • Comfortable facilitating workshops and engaging with non-designers
  • Experience working in Agile teams, with a bias toward action and experimentation
  • Knowledge of HTML/CSS; JavaScript is a plus
  • Skilled in tools like Figma, Miro, and research/texting tools, etc
  • Good understanding of user research methods and the ability to analyse data to inform design decisions
  • Passion for learning, exploring new methods, and helping others grow
  • Excellent communication, storytelling and interpersonal skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams and stakeholders

Ideally, you’ll also have:

  • Appetite to take ownership of several complex initiatives
  • Dedication to working with your colleagues as part of a high-performing team
  • Natural curiosity and the confidence to provide alternative options or suggestions when you see something that could be improved
  • Passion to lend subject matter expertise to the design, planning and implementation of strategic transformational initiatives for our clients

postedCompany.description:
We are an award-winning, full-service Web Solutions Company based in Singapore. Websparks Pte Ltd is formed in 2008.


Each of our Websparkers should be Curious, Collaborative, Committed, and a Challenger. We wake up daily to deliver extraordinary digital experiences to our customers.


Websparks is an ISO 27001 certified company. ISO/IEC 27001 is the leading international standard for information security management and helps organizations to keep information assets secure. Websparks is an ISO 9001:2015 certified company. We have demonstrated to external auditors our commitment to quality. We are able to consistently provide products and services that meet our client’s requirements.


Websparks is named as APN Select Consulting Partner as a result of our investment in technical resource development aimed at ensuring efficient usage of the AWS cloud. Websparks is certified as a Microsoft Gold Application Development, Silver Application Integration and DevOps Partner. We are equipped with the tools and resources to deliver the best quality of software.


Websparks is a Progress Gold Partner. As a Progress partner, we play a key role in helping organizations of all sizes – across all industries – transform and run their businesses. Websparks is a Sitecore Solution Partner.  Solution partners bring their customers' unique visions to dynamic life on their websites with the Sitecore Experience Platform.
postedCompany.name: WEBSPARKS PTE. LTD.
